nasb.text: But King Solomon shall be blessed, and the throne of David shall be established before the Lord forever.”

esv.text: But King Solomon shall be blessed, and the throne of David shall be established before the Lord forever.”

cnv.text: 所羅門王卻要蒙福，大衛的王位必在耶和華眼前得堅立，直到永遠。”

ccb.text: 但所罗门王必蒙祝福，大卫的王位在耶和华面前必永远稳固。”
